name: algolia
description: Twelve specialist skills for Algolia-powered search: index design, relevance tuning, InstantSearch React/Next.js, Autocomplete, search-client, indexing pipelines (Contentful → Algolia, batch + streaming), API-key strategy, the Recommend API, AI search and Personalization (NeuralSearch), Insights events and A/B, Contentful ↔ Algolia integration, and Algolia MCP/CLI workflows. One agent (algolia-agent) and five slash commands (/algolia-bootstrap, /algolia-audit, /algolia-relevance-review, /algolia-reindex, /algolia-keys-rotate) for the engagement lifecycle. Production-grade guidance for Slalom's Composable DXP practice.
